metrics.name: Shots per 90
metrics.description: Total shots attempted per 90 minutes (primary box presence indicator)

metrics.name: Shots on target per 90
metrics.description: Shots on target per 90 minutes (proxy for dangerous box touches)

metrics.name: Was fouled per 90
metrics.description: Times fouled per 90 minutes (proxy for box movement drawing fouls)

metrics.name: Blocked shots per 90
metrics.description: Shots that were blocked per 90 minutes (reflects persistent shooting volume)

metrics.name: Goal conversion, %
metrics.description: Percentage of shots converted into goals

metrics.name: Successful dribbles per 90
metrics.description: Successful dribbles per 90 minutes (proxy for off-ball movement and progressive runs into box)

metrics.name: Total duels per 90
metrics.description: Total duels engaged per 90 minutes (proxy for pressing engagement)

core_10_model.scoring_method: Each metric is computed from Sofascore raw stats per the computation formula, then converted to percentile (0-100). For inverse metrics (higher_is_better: false), the inverted percentile is used. Category score = average percentile of metrics in that category. Final score = sum(category_score * category_weight).
